title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 701.361 - Rulemaking procedure
text:
701.361.  Rulemaking procedure. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 701.350 to 701.380 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1035 § 3 subsecs. 4 to 10, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
